summary: Complete testing of PicParty STAFF features and role-based access control. All 7 requested features verified working correctly.

design_issues.screen: STAFF View - Badge in p tag
issues: Console warning: Badge (div) rendered inside p tag - hydration warning. Minor issue, does not affect functionality.

passed_tests: BACKEND: API root accessible
BACKEND: GET /api/events - Returns events ordered by created_at DESC (último subido primero)
BACKEND: GET /api/contracts - Retrieves all contracts
BACKEND: Contract model has link_fotos and link_videos fields
BACKEND: PUT /api/contracts/{id}/links - Updates links successfully
BACKEND: PUT /api/contracts/{id}/links - Partial update (only link_fotos) works
BACKEND: PUT /api/contracts/{id}/links - Non-existent contract returns 404
BACKEND: Contract model includes all required STAFF fields
FRONTEND: Homepage shows events ordered by created_at DESC (RESIDEO first, then FERNANDA, then PAULA)
FRONTEND: Login STAFF with STAFF/PICPARTY2026 works - shows 'Acceso STAFF autorizado'
FRONTEND: Login ADMIN with OCTAVIO/CHELO1980 works - shows 'Acceso ADMIN autorizado'
FRONTEND: STAFF view shows 'PicParty STAFF' header with Staff badge
FRONTEND: STAFF view shows restricted interface (no tabs for Contratos, Reporte Pagos, etc.)
FRONTEND: STAFF view has event selector with all contracts and status indicators (⏳, 💰, ✅)
FRONTEND: STAFF view shows event info (client name, date, phone, anticipo status)
FRONTEND: STAFF view shows 'Servicios Contratados' section with badges
FRONTEND: STAFF view has 'Links de Fotoshare.co' section with link_fotos and link_videos inputs
FRONTEND: STAFF view has 'Guardar Links de Fotoshare' button (calls PUT /contracts/{id}/links)
FRONTEND: STAFF view has 'Templates del Evento' section with 'Abrir Templates en Cloudinary' button
FRONTEND: ADMIN view shows full panel with tabs (Contratos, Reporte Pagos, Galería Pro, PICPARTYLIVE, Cloudinary)

1_events_ordering.details: Events displayed in created_at DESC order (último subido primero). RESIDEO shown first (created 2026-02-16T03:55:21.506937Z), then FERNANDA, then PAULA.

2_staff_login.details: Login successful, shows 'Acceso STAFF autorizado' toast and restricted view

3_admin_login.details: Login successful, shows 'Acceso ADMIN autorizado' toast and full panel with tabs

4_staff_event_selector.details: Selector shows all contracts with status indicators - OCTAVIO ⏳, PACO Y LUISA ⏳, Juan Perez Martinez ⏳

5_staff_event_details.details: Selecting event shows: client name, event date, phone, status badge, servicios contratados badges, link fields

6_api_links_endpoint.details: Successfully updates link_fotos and link_videos fields, returns 404 for non-existent contract

7_role_separation.staff_view: Only shows 'Galería de Eventos por Contrato' - no tabs
7_role_separation.admin_view: Shows full tabs: Contratos (3), Reporte Pagos, Galería Pro (3), PICPARTYLIVE (18), Cloudinary

critical_code_review_comments:

tag in STAFF view line 3625 causes React hydration warning. Consider using instead of

for the Estado label container.
seed_data_creation: Used existing contract ID 35edb6c8-4199-4ea9-9165-2a1fb68acb95 (OCTAVIO) with existing links for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All STAFF features verified: 1) Events ordered by created_at DESC, 2) STAFF login works (STAFF/PICPARTY2026), 3) ADMIN login works (OCTAVIO/CHELO1980), 4) Event selector shows all contracts with status indicators, 5) Event selection displays info, services, and link fields, 6) PUT /contracts/{id}/links API works, 7) STAFF view restricted (no tabs), ADMIN view full (with tabs).
